---
author: Patrick Roddy
date: 2026-06-29
format: revealjs
institute: "[UCL ARC](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/advanced-research-computing)"
subtitle:
  "[STEP-UP RSLondon Conference 2026](https://step-up.ac.uk/events/step-up-2026)"
title: The Python Array API Standard
---

{{< include /_includes/qr-code.qmd >}}
